verdict_reasons: F1: handleOfferCreate auth check ADDED (P1 security)
F2: handleEvidenceSubmit auth check ADDED (P1 security)
F3: Market filter UI IMPLEMENTED (P2 UX)
F4: Soft 404 on auction detail FIXED (P2 UX)
X1: Data-room IDOR fixed — buyer access verified via session, not X-Buyer-Email header (P0 security)
X2: Offer ownership checks ADDED — package status, seller self-offer block, buyer_request ownership, duplicate offer (409), currency validation (VND/USD), buyer_request_id now mandatory (P1 security)
X3: Evidence ownership checks ADDED — evidence_type enum, package ownership, R2-internal file_url (P1 security)
X4: Data-room request-access now requires auth and verifies room existence (P1 security)
X5: Rate limiting ADDED to all authenticated write endpoints (P1 security)
X6: Upload pipeline ADDED — MIME allowlist, size limit, hash, quarantine, scan hook; arbitrary file_url rejected (P1 security)
E1: Split-brain Cloudflare accounts — unresolved (P1 ops)
E3: lily.omdalat.com on non-production Worker — unresolved (P1)
E4: www.omdalat.com different Pages project than apex — unresolved (P2)

p0_claimed_fixed.description: Data-room IDOR: buyer access controlled by spoofable X-Buyer-Email header
p0_claimed_fixed.fix: Require auth first; verify grant via auth.email from session; remove X-Buyer-Email access decision
p0_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X1 authenticated buyer without grant 403, with grant 200

p1_claimed_fixed.fix: Enforce buyer_request_id; validate currency VND/USD; block seller self-offer; block duplicate; reject negative amounts; verify buyer_request ownership
p1_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X2 negative amount 400, duplicate 409, self-offer 403, valid VND 201, valid USD 201

p1_claimed_fixed.fix: Validate evidence_type enum; verify package ownership; restrict file_url to R2 internal
p1_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X3 invalid type 400, external URL 400, non-owner 403, owner 201

p1_claimed_fixed.description: handleDataRoomRequestAccess had no auth and no room existence check
p1_claimed_fixed.fix: Require auth; use auth.email; verify data room exists before inserting grant request
p1_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X4 no auth 401, non-existent room 404, valid room 201

p1_claimed_fixed.description: No rate limiting on authenticated write endpoints
p1_claimed_fixed.fix: Fixed-window D1-backed rate limits applied to offer create, evidence submit, data-room request-access, KYC submit, escrow create, and auction bids
p1_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X5 429 tests for offers, evidence, data-room, KYC, escrow

p1_claimed_fixed.description: No file MIME, size, or malware validation; arbitrary file_url accepted
p1_claimed_fixed.fix: Upload pipeline with MIME allowlist, 50MB size limit, SHA-256, quarantine, malware scan hook; evidence/KYC require clean upload_id instead of file_url
p1_claimed_fixed.behavioral_tests: e2e-journeys.test.ts: X6 invalid MIME, oversized, Content-Type mismatch, external URL, missing scan status, KYC upload_id

p1_open.description: Auth baseline incomplete: no MFA/passkey, CSRF, per-subdomain cookies, login lockout, session rotation

p2_should_fix.description: Canonical SEO was wrong on BAN subdomains
p2_should_fix.fix: Self-canonical URLs added to all 29 COMMON_HEAD callers — live verified
Added meta robots noindex + X-Robots-Tag + Cache-Control no-store to 12 admin handlers — live verified

tests.note: All tests pass locally. Independent remote verification pending.

Fix F2: Add requireAuth to handleEvidenceSubmit — DONE
Fix X1: Data-room IDOR via X-Buyer-Email — DONE
Fix X2: Offer ownership/duplicate/currency checks — DONE (buyer_request_id mandatory, currency VND/USD)
Fix X3: Evidence ownership/type/file validation — DONE (R2 URL restriction)
Fix X4: Data-room request-access auth + room existence — DONE
Fix X5: Rate limiting on write endpoints — DONE
Fix X6: Upload pipeline (MIME, size, malware scan hook) — DONE (real provider wiring pending)
KYC/KYB provider integration verified in production — BLOCKED
Escrow provider integration verified in production — BLOCKED
Legal partner signoff on auction terms (documented) — BLOCKED
E2E test suite covering critical user journeys — DONE (220/220)
No P1 or P2 findings open — NOT MET (X5, X6, AUTH_BASELINE, E1-E4 open)
notes: This verdict is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for release status.
The previous RE_AUDIT_2026-06-30_REMEDIATION_VERIFICATION.md PASS verdict covered only F1-F4.
Extended P1 re-audit (X1-X6) found and fixed X1-X4; X5-X6 remain open.
Wild *.omdalat.com ecosystem remains HOLD due to E1-E4.
Auction and high-value transaction release remains BLOCKED.
Remote GitHub verification of governance docs and latest commits is pending.
X6 malware scan hook is a stub. No real provider is configured. Production file flows remain BLOCKED until a provider is wired and sandbox-tested.
